name: useQuery
description: Hook that defines the logic when query data
examples: const { data, isFetching, isLoading, isError, isSuccess, error, refetch, isRefetching, abort, aborted } = useQuery(() => fetch('url'));

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked

source.source: * @param {() => Promise<Data>} callback The callback function to be invoked

tokens.name: callback
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked
